message:
feat(embed,index): in-place normalize for model2vec embedder, NaN-safe vector comparison in HNSW

model2vec_embedder.rs:
- Apply same in-place L2 normalization pattern as fastembed: replace
  allocating l2_normalize() with local normalize_in_place() that handles
  degenerate norms (NaN/subnormal) by zeroing the vector
- Remove unused l2_normalize import

hnsw.rs:
- Add early return in vector_component_close() for non-finite values
  (NaN, Inf): two non-finite values with different bit patterns are never
  considered close, preventing NaN propagation through relative epsilon
  comparison that would otherwise always evaluate to false but could mask
  subtle floating-point bugs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
